title: Remove Trailing Zeros From a String
titleCn: 移除字符串中的尾随零

testcases.input: num = "51230100" Output: "512301" Explanation: Integer "51230100" has 2 trailing zeros, we remove them and return integer "512301".
testcases.expectedOutput: "512301" Explanation: Integer "51230100" has 2 trailing zeros, we remove them and return integer "512301".

testcases.input: num = "123" Output: "123" Explanation: Integer "123" has no trailing zeros, we return integer "123".
testcases.expectedOutput: "123" Explanation: Integer "123" has no trailing zeros, we return integer "123".
